full_label.generic_name: VITAMIN A, VITAMIN C, VITAMIN D, VITAMIN E, THIAMINE, RIBOFLAVIN, NIACIN, VITAMIN B6, FOLIC ACID, VITAMIN B12, CALCIUM, IRON, ZINC, COPPER
full_label.warnings: WARNING: Accidental overdose of iron-containing products is a leading cause of fatal poisoning in children under 6. Keep this product out of reach of children. In case of accidental overdose, call a doctor or poison control center immediately.
full_label.dosage: DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Before, during and/or after pregnancy, one tablet daily, with a meal, or as directed by a licensed healthcare practitioner regardless of lactation status.
